structuredContent.sql:
SELECT table_name, constraint_name, column_name, referenced_table_name, referenced_column_name FROM information_schema.key_column_usage WHERE table_schema='pmacontrol' AND referenced_table_name IS NOT NULL ORDER BY table_name, constraint_name, ordinal_position
LIMIT 5000
